title: Roasted Aromatic Weeknight Irish Arabic Rice Pilaf
description: A hearty, simple Irish-inspired pilaf with aromatic flavors and an air of the Middle East.

ingredients.name: Arabic rice
ingredients.notes: preferably basmati or a similar long-grain rice

instructions: Heat the cataplana over low heat on a stovetop.
Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil and swirl to coat the bottom of the cataplana.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and sauté for another 3 minutes.
Add the olive oil sautéed vegetables, salt, black pepper, ground cumin, and dried thyme to the cataplana.
Stir in the Arabic rice and chicken broth.
Cover the cataplana with a lid or foil and transfer to a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C).
Roast in the oven for 25 minutes.
Remove the cataplana from the oven, fluff the rice with a fork, and return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Finish with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
